# idsec_sia_settings_rdp_file_parameters (Resource)

The SIA RDP File Parameters resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "idsec_sia_settings_rdp_file_parameters" "example" {
  disable_credentials_delegation = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `disable_credentials_delegation` (Boolean) Choose to ignore or disable credential delegation parameter.
